title: Memorandum Circular No. 47, s. 1999
text:
Office of the President of the Philippines Malacañang

MEMORANDUM CIRCULAR NO. 47

AUTHORIZING THE ATTENDANCE OF ALL LAWYERS IN THE EXECUTIVE BRANCH IN REGION VI IN THE LAW PRACTICE INSTITUTE ON OCTOBER 21 AND 22, 1999 AT THE AMIGO TERRACE HOTEL, ILOILO CITY

The Integrated Bar of the Philippines, Iloilo Chapter, and the University of the Philippines Law Center will jointly hold a General Law Practice Institute on October 21 and 22, 1999 at the Amigo Terrace Hotel, Iloilo City.

In connection with this, all lawyers in the executive branch of Region VI are hereby authorized to attend the Institute on official time.

Participants shall submit to their respective units a complete report of their attendance or participation in the said Institute.

By authority of the President: (Sgd.) RONALDO B. ZAMORA Executive Secretary

Manila, October 18, 1999

Source: CDAsia
